demo.title: symbiosis-swap.sh
demo.code:
# Get a cross-chain quote (no execution)
# Args: src_chain_id src_token src_decimals amount dst_chain_id dst_token dst_decimals
python3 scripts/symbiosis-quote.py \
  8453 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913 6 10 \
  137 0x3c499c542cEF5E3811e1192ce70d8cC03d5c3359 6

# Execute: bridge 2 USDC from Base to Polygon
python3 scripts/symbiosis-swap.py \
  8453 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913 6 2 \
  137 0x3c499c542cEF5E3811e1192ce70d8cC03d5c3359 6

# Use native tokens with zero address
# ETH on Base → POL on Polygon
python3 scripts/symbiosis-swap.py \
  8453 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 18 0.1 \
  137 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 18

setup: Set `BANKR_API_KEY` env var — Symbiosis uses Bankr to submit transactions
Install Python 3 and the scripts from the symbiosis skill directory
Run quote script to preview output amount and fees before swapping
Run swap script — outputs tx hash and block explorer link
